text.config.onlycoords.title: OnlyCoords
option.onlycoords.enabled.description: Show or hide the coordinates HUD.
option.onlycoords.hideWhenF3Open.descrip: Hide the HUD while the vanilla debug screen (F3) is open.
option.onlycoords.showDirection.descript: Add a second line with the cardinal direction you are facing.
option.onlycoords.showDecimals.descripti: Display fractional coordinates instead of floored integers.
option.onlycoords.decimalCount.descripti: Number of decimal places shown when decimals are enabled (0-3).
option.onlycoords.anchor.description: Which corner or edge of the screen the HUD is anchored to.
option.onlycoords.offsetX.description: Horizontal offset from the anchor, in pixels.
option.onlycoords.offsetY.description: Vertical offset from the anchor, in pixels.
option.onlycoords.textColor.description: Color (with alpha) of the coordinate text.
option.onlycoords.dropShadow.description: Render a drop shadow behind the text.
option.onlycoords.background.description: Draw a filled rectangle behind the text.
option.onlycoords.backgroundColor.descri: Color (with alpha) of the background rectangle.
